prompts.text: Before they tap: read the word together, then press 'Say it' to hear it spoken, then find the picture. This read → hear → find sequence reinforces word recognition deliberately.
Core question after a correct match: 'What is a [word]? Where might you see one?' — moves from recognition to meaning to real-world connection.
'What other things are similar to [word]?' — builds vocabulary clusters and category thinking. E.g. dog → cat, rabbit → other animals. Grouping deepens word knowledge.
Point to the first letter: 'This word starts with [letter] — it says /sound/. Can you find that letter?' — bridges word recognition to phonics awareness.
